title: Introduction to React
description: Learn the fundamentals of React, including components, JSX, props, and state.

title: Getting Started with TypeScript
description: Understand TypeScript basics, static typing, interfaces, and type aliases.

title: Node.js Essentials
description: Explore how Node.js works, its event-driven architecture, and asynchronous programming.

title: Express.js REST API
description: Build RESTful APIs using Express.js with routing, middleware, and controllers.

title: Working with MongoDB
description: Learn how to store, retrieve, update, and delete data using MongoDB and Mongoose.

title: Docker Fundamentals
description: Understand Docker images, containers, volumes, networks, and Docker Compose.

title: Authentication with JWT
description: Implement secure user authentication using JSON Web Tokens and protected routes.

title: Building a Full-Stack Application
description: Connect a React frontend with a Node.js backend and integrate a database.

title: Introduction to AI and RAG
description: Learn how Retrieval-Augmented Generation works using embeddings, vector databases, and LLMs.

title: Deploying Applications
description: Deploy containerized applications to cloud platforms using Docker and CI/CD pipelines.
